channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Microsoft hit with more litigation accusing it of predatory pricing
item.description: A UK law firm on Tuesday filed what amounts to a class-action lawsuit against Microsoft, accusing it of using its market share to overcharge clients running Windows Server on AWS, Google, or Alibaba cloud offerings instead of on Microsoft Azure.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why AI2 CEO Ali Farhadi believes the future of AI has to be open source
item.description: AI researcher and industry insider Ali Farhadi doesn’t mince words when it comes to open-source artificial intelligence: “Openness is the only way forward,” he says.
item.dc:creator: Janya Sundar, Fast Company

item.title: Trump's FBI pick Kash Patel targeted in Iranian cyberattack
item.description: Kash Patel, President-elect Trump’s nominee to lead the FBI, was among those targeted by an Iranian cyber attack. It’s unclear whether any information was gained through the attack, but it makes Patel the latest figure in the Trump campaign to be pursued by the nation.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Generative AI Set to Disrupt Highly Skilled Workforces
item.description: Generative AI poised to automate non-routine cognitive tasks, affecting education, IT, and finance sectors.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The first ‘AI elections’ weren’t as disastrous as predicted. Here’s why
item.description: It’s been the biggest year for elections in human history: 2024 is a “super-cycle” year in which 3.7 billion eligible voters in 72 countries had the chance to go to the polls.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: Report: AI expands the IT workforce as tech jobs return to offices
item.description: Artificial intelligence is driving growth for the IT workforce, and jobs in the technology sector are stabilizing as the market continues to show moderate growth amidst economic volatility, rapid hiring cycles, and public layoffs, according to a new study by IT staffing firm Motion Recruitment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Crypto Mogul Roger Ver Faces US Tax Evasion Charges Amid Spanish Extradition Proceedings
item.description: Roger Ver, known as Bitcoin Jesus, faces tax evasion charges in the US for selling $240 million in tokens. His lawyers argue that the exit tax is unconstitutional and impermissibly vague.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: The FBI now says encryption is good for you
item.description: Apple has faced an unequal battle in recent years as some lawmakers, the FBI, and regulators insist that the company create backdoors through which to access messages and other parts of its platform.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The UAE’s digital transformation: A visionary leap into the future
item.description: As the United Arab Emirates celebrates its 53rd National Day, it reflects on an extraordinary journey of transformation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Intro to Express.js: Endpoints, parameters, and routes
item.description: Express.js is the most-used HTTP server and middleware platform for Node.js. Let’s take a hands-on look at what it brings to the table. Request handling with Express.js Handling requests over the Internet is one of the most frequent and common tasks in software development.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon’s AWS unveils new supercomputer with its AI chips in a challenge to Nvidia
item.description: Amazon.com’s cloud unit on Tuesday showed new data center servers packed with its own AI chips that will challenge Nvidia, with Apple coming aboard as a customer to use them.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Heroku PaaS adds .NET support
item.description: Meeting a longstanding request from users, Salesforce’s Heroku — one of the original platforms as a service (PaaS) — has unveiled official support for .NET development. Heroku also made its Heroku Next Generation Platform available in a pilot.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Cyber Monday shoppers expected to set a record on the year's biggest day for online shopping
item.description: Consumers in the United States are scouring the internet for online deals as they look to take advantage of the post-Thanksgiving shopping marathon with Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: AWS brings RAG evaluation and LLM-as-a-judge feature to Amazon Bedrock
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated Amazon Bedrock with features designed to help enterprises streamline the testing of applications before deployment.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Helpful Hack: Siri's new tricks, photo magic and writing help with iOS 18.1's new AI features
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to update your iPhone to add Apple Intelligence, which he says can transform your interactions with your phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Artificial intelligence changes across the US
item.description: As more companies implement artificial intelligence for daily tasks, some industry leaders are working to push back against certain aspects of the technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Spotify playlists are being hijacked to promote pirated software and scams
item.description: Spammers have found a way to target Spotify playlists and podcasts to push pirated software, cheat codes for games and spam links and malware sites.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
